# services.geth

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.geth`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.geth` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Specification of one or more geth instances. |
| `services.geth.<name>.authrpc.address` | `string` | Listen address of Go Ethereum Auth RPC API. |
| `services.geth.<name>.authrpc.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Go Ethereum Auth RPC API. |
| `services.geth.<name>.authrpc.jwtsecret` | `string` | Path to a JWT secret for authenticated RPC endpoint. |
| `services.geth.<name>.authrpc.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port number of Go Ethereum Auth RPC API. |
| `services.geth.<name>.authrpc.vhosts` | `null or (list of string)` | List of virtual hostnames from which to accept requests. |
| `services.geth.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Go Ethereum Node. |
| `services.geth.<name>.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Additional arguments passed to Go Ethereum. |
| `services.geth.<name>.gcmode` | `one of "full", "archive"` | Blockchain garbage collection mode. |
| `services.geth.<name>.http.address` | `string` | Listen address of Go Ethereum HTTP API. |
| `services.geth.<name>.http.apis` | `null or (list of string)` | APIs to enable over WebSocket |
| `services.geth.<name>.http.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Go Ethereum HTTP API. |
| `services.geth.<name>.http.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port number of Go Ethereum HTTP API. |
| `services.geth.<name>.maxpeers` | `signed integer` | Maximum peers to connect to. |
| `services.geth.<name>.metrics.address` | `string` | Listen address of Go Ethereum metrics service. |
| `services.geth.<name>.metrics.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Go Ethereum prometheus metrics. |
| `services.geth.<name>.metrics.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port number of Go Ethereum metrics service. |
| `services.geth.<name>.network` | `null or one of "holesky", "sepolia"` | The network to connect to. Mainnet (null) is the default ethereum network. |
| `services.geth.<name>.package` | `package` | The geth package to use. |
| `services.geth.<name>.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port number Go Ethereum will be listening on, both TCP and UDP. |
| `services.geth.<name>.syncmode` | `one of "snap", "fast", "full", "light"` | Blockchain sync mode. |
| `services.geth.<name>.websocket.address` | `string` | Listen address of Go Ethereum WebSocket API. |
| `services.geth.<name>.websocket.apis` | `null or (list of string)` | APIs to enable over WebSocket |
| `services.geth.<name>.websocket.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Go Ethereum WebSocket API. |
| `services.geth.<name>.websocket.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port number of Go Ethereum WebSocket API. |
